footer.description: Create and share wishlists for any celebration. Turn your wishes into unforgettable moments.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Find answers to common questions and get support
helpCenter.contactDescription: Get in touch with our support team
helpCenter.topic1Title: How do I create a wishlist?
helpCenter.topic1Description: Creating a wishlist is easy! Simply click on 'Create Wishlist' in your dashboard and follow the step-by-step guide.
helpCenter.topic2Title: How do I share my wishlist?
helpCenter.topic2Description: You can share your wishlist by clicking the share button and sending the link to your friends and family.
helpCenter.topic3Description: Yes, you can edit your wishlist at any time by going to your dashboard and selecting the wishlist you want to modify.
helpCenter.topic4Title: How do I reserve a gift?
helpCenter.topic4Description: When viewing someone's wishlist, click on the 'Reserve' button next to any item to mark it as reserved.
helpCenter.topic5Title: What if I forget my password?
helpCenter.topic5Description: You can reset your password by clicking 'Forgot Password' on the login page and following the instructions sent to your email.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: We're here to help! Get in touch with us.
contactUs.description: Have a question or need assistance? We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below or reach out to us directly.
contactUs.name: Name
contactUs.subject: Subject
contactUs.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about iWish
faq.answer1: iWish is a platform that allows you to create and share wishlists for any celebration, making it easy for your loved ones to know exactly what you want.
faq.question2: How do I create an account?
faq.answer2: You can create an account by clicking 'Sign Up' on the homepage or login page. Fill in your details and you'll be ready to start creating wishlists!
faq.answer3: Yes, iWish is completely free to use. You can create unlimited wishlists and share them with anyone.
faq.question4: How do I add items to my wishlist?
faq.answer4: After creating a wishlist, you can add items by clicking the 'Add Item' button and filling in the details of the gift you want.
faq.question5: Can I make my wishlist private?
faq.answer5: Yes, you can set your wishlist to private so only people you share the link with can view it.
faq.question6: How do I delete a wishlist?
faq.answer6: You can delete a wishlist by going to your dashboard, selecting the wishlist, and clicking the delete option.
faq.question7: What happens if someone reserves a gift?
faq.answer7: When someone reserves a gift, it will be marked as 'Reserved' so others know it's already been claimed.
faq.question8: Can I use iWish on mobile?
faq.answer8: Yes, iWish is fully responsive and works great on mobile devices, tablets, and desktops.
faq.question9: How do I change my password?
faq.answer9: You can change your password by going to Profile Settings and selecting 'Change Password'.
faq.answer10: You control who can see your wishlist. You can share it with specific people or make it public.
faq.contactUsText: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.section1Content: At iWish, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our service.
privacyPolicy.section2Content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, and any information you include in your wishlists. We also automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with our service.
privacyPolicy.section3Content: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, and to personalize your experience. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacyPolicy.section4Content: We may share your information only in specific circumstances, such as when required by law or to protect our rights. We do not share your information with third parties for their marketing purposes.
privacyPolicy.section5Content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacyPolicy.section6Content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time. You can do this through your account settings or by contacting us.
privacyPolicy.section7Content: We use cookies to enhance your experience. For more information, please see our Cookie Policy.
privacyPolicy.section8Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.
privacyPolicy.questions: Have questions about our Privacy Policy?

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: By accessing and using iWish, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.section2Content: Permission is granted to temporarily use iWish for personal, non-commercial use only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title.
terms.section3Content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.section4Content: You retain ownership of any content you post on iWish. By posting content, you grant us a license to use, modify, and display that content on our platform.
terms.section5Content: You may not use iWish for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform unlawful acts. You may not violate any local, state, national, or international law.
terms.section6Content: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by iWish and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.section7Content: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service.
terms.section8Content: The information on iWish is provided on an 'as is' basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaim all warranties.
terms.section9Content: In no event shall iWish be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the service.
terms.section10Content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Slovakia, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms.questions: Have questions about our Terms of Service?

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.section1Content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to website owners.
cookiePolicy.section2Content: We use cookies to remember your preferences, improve your experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. We use both session cookies and persistent cookies.
cookiePolicy.section3Content: We use essential cookies that are necessary for the website to function, analytics cookies to understand how visitors use our site, and preference cookies to remember your settings.
cookiePolicy.section4Content: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages. We do not control these cookies, and you should check the third-party websites for more information.
cookiePolicy.section5Content: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookiePolicy.section6Content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We encourage you to review this page periodically for any changes.
cookiePolicy.questions: Have questions about our Cookie Policy?

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.subtitle: We are committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.
accessibility.section1Content: iWish is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.
accessibility.section2Content: We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 level AA standards. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible for people with disabilities.
accessibility.section3Content: Our website includes features such as keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, alternative text for images, and clear heading structures to improve accessibility.
accessibility.section4Content: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of iWish. If you encounter any accessibility barriers, please contact us and we will work to address them.
accessibility.section5Content: We regularly review our website and make improvements to ensure accessibility. Our team is trained in accessibility best practices.
accessibility.section6Content: If you have questions or concerns about accessibility, please contact us. We are committed to making iWish accessible to everyone.
accessibility.feedback: Have feedback or questions about accessibility?
